summary: Reviewed the five listed open PRs under the opt-in low-signal policy. No close_low_signal actions are safe: every candidate has focused implementation/proof, maintainer signal, active review context, or requires maintainer/product judgment.

actions.reason: Focused bug fix with proof and linked active issue; maintainer review is required instead of low-signal closure.
Broad but concrete auth-provider feature with linked issue and proof; not boringly clear low-signal cleanup.
There are real implementation and proof questions, so maintainer review is required rather than low-signal closure.
Maintainer signal and active author follow-up block low-signal closure.
Focused compatibility change with maintainer signal; maintainer review is required.
